title: No Such Thing As A Fish - No Such Thing As An Upside-Down Grand Prix

Yeah. Or dog as well. It's bed hair, basically, but you're drooling. Yeah, exactly. The Spaniels' ears is that a hairstyle that you see loads in 18th century. paintings where women have their hair flat on top and then curled down the sides. Oh, okay. Looks like you've got Spaniel's ears.
